subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This servant of Thine hath forsaken all mention and occupied himself with Thy remembrance, hath turned his gaze from every direction and set his face towards Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک ترک کل ذکرا و اشتغل بذکرک و غض الطرف عن کل جهه و توجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
